w:r.w:t: This questionnaire is designed to capture all essential details required for product listing and compliance. Please provide comprehensive answers in the spaces provided.
Identify the primary classification and naming conventions for the product.
Category (Face Cream / Face Wash / Soap / Nalangu Maavu)
Detail the narrative, usage instructions, and safety information.
Deep clean, detoxify, and refresh your skin instantly.

Wash away pollution and reveal a crisp, clear complexion with our handcrafted Charcoal Detox Soap. Made using the traditional cold-processed method, this premium bar infuses pure, toxin-absorbing Charcoal Powder into a deeply nourishing base of Cold-Pressed Coconut, Castor, and Olive oils. Rich in natural Glycerin and Vitamin E, it acts like a magnet to draw out deep-seated impurities, unclog pores, and control excess oil without stripping moisture. Experience a rich, creamy lather that leaves your skin feeling incredibly clean, smooth, and thoroughly revitalized.
Deep Pore Detox, Oil Control, & Pollution Defense.
Ideal for all skin types, especially oily, combination, or acne-prone skin.
Handcrafted Charcoal Detox Soap – The Ultimate Deep Pore Cleanse

Reset your skin from daily pollution and stress. Our specially formulated Charcoal Soap is meticulously handcrafted in small batches using pure plant oils and premium activated charcoal powder to deeply clarify, purify, and protect your skin with every single wash.
Built on a master base of
for unbeatable skin conditioning. Through the traditional cold-process method using
, these premium oils retain 100% of their natural nutrients, creating a bar that balances oil production while shielding your skin barrier.
Cold-Pressed Coconut Oil, Cold-Pressed Castor Oil, Olive Oil, Demineralized Water, Lye , Natural Glycerine, Activated Charcoal, Vitamin E Oil, Premium Essential Oil.
Rub the soap bar between wet palms or directly onto your body to create a rich, creamy lather.
Gently massage onto your skin in circular motions.
Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry. Pro-Tip: To make your handcrafted soap last longer, keep it in a well-drained soap dish between uses.
Why Your Skin Will Love This:
is a time-tested herbal remedy famous for clearing up body acne, facial breakouts, and blemishes by naturally eliminating skin congestion and bacteria.
The exceptional anti-inflammatory properties of Kuppaimeni help soothe skin allergies, redness, itching, and minor fungal or bacterial skin infections.
It draws out deep-seated impurities, toxins, and excess oil from your pores, leaving your skin feeling intensely purified and refreshed.
Unlike harsh commercial antiseptic soaps that dry out your skin, our traditional cold-process bar naturally retains
to lock in deep, long-lasting moisture.
Formulated with real botanical extracts and pure essential oils. We recommend a quick patch test on your jawline before your first use.
Store in a cool, dry place. External use only.
